Published Company Headline Message Category 2025-10-28 17:30:00 EET Nokia Inside Information: NVIDIA to make USD 1.0 billion equity investment in Nokia in addition to new strategic partnership - Nokia's Board resolved on directed share issuance to NVIDIA Inside information 2025-10-23 08:00:01 EEST Nokia Nokia Corporation Interim Report for Q3 2025 Interim report (Q1 and Q3) 2025-07-24 08:00:01 EEST Nokia Nokia Corporation Report for Q2 and Half Year 2025 Half Year financial report 2025-03-13 23:30:58 EET Nokia Nokia has published its Nokia in 2024 Annual Report and filed its Annual Report on Form 20-F for 2024 Annual Financial Report 2025-11-13 14:30:00 EET Nokia Directed share issuance to NVIDIA completed - a change in the total number of Nokia shares    Total number of voting rights and capital 2026-05-31 13:00:00 EEST Nokia Nokia Corporation - Managers' transactions (Hanrahan) Managers' transactions
